# BP-149 positive variant: zap logs an error branch without zap.Error.
lang: go
file: BP-149-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: zap-error-without-attribute
---
package service

import "go.uber.org/zap"

func save() error {
	err := doSave()
	if err != nil {
		zap.L().Error("save failed")
	}
	return nil
}

func doSave() error { return nil }
